description: In the demodb database, create a custom security role and user account for a new data analyst. The role must be named 'data_analyst', inherit from the built-in 'reader' role, and use mode 0 (deny-all-but). Grant this role CREATE permissions on the 'database.class' and 'database.cluster' resources. Additionally, create a database user named 'maria_garcia' with password 'Analyst2024!' and status 'ACTIVE', assigned to the 'data_analyst' role. Connect to the demodb database using admin/admin or root/GymAnything123! credentials. After completion, the user maria_garcia should be able to authenticate and read data from existing classes.
